text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day before the Yayoi Sho and Manhattan
Cafe and Agnes Tachyon are in their shared
classroom.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, my cryotherapy strategy is set in place.
Just what I need to handle an ever faster track!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong, Cafe? Is that fire in your eyes your
way of warming up for tomorrow's race? Or
perhaps...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Why? Why did you tell me that you're running in
the Yayoi Sho?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It isn't like you to share unnecessary information.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Heh-heh. "Unnecessary," you say? What I
consider necessary is determined by me, not you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Tomorrow marks the Yayoi Sho, a race more
significant than even the Satsuki Sho. Titles like
G1 and G2 are nothing more than
externally-assigned signifiers.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Some things can mean more to the individual than
their standardized classifications suggest!
Important judgments must be made from time to
time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Simply put, I mean to say it's an important race to
me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And I'm glad that you made it, you know. You
came along sooner than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Tomorrow, I want you to show me who you are.
Show me your present, and your future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Yayoi Sho.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I talked with Tachyon yesterday. About a lot of
things...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Nothing. She speaks in terms that make sense
only to her...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I think it might be best to put it to one side for
now. It's more important that I...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I'll find out in today's race if chasing
Tachyon is the fastest way to get closer to my
friend...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'll chase her down. And I'll use all the
strength I can muster. ...So watch closely.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might be the worry showing on her face, but
Manhattan Cafe looks quite worn out. It's clear
how serious she is.
